title: Datadog (DDOG) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Datadog Q4 2023 Earnings Call Highlights. Financial Performance: Datadog delivered strong Q4 2023 results with revenue of 590 million representing 26 percent year-over-year growth and exceeding guidance. The company generated 201 million in free cash flow with a 34 percent margin. Customer Metrics: Total customers increased to 27,300 from 23,200 year-over-year. Customers with 100K plus ARR reached 3,190 up from 2,780. Million-dollar ARR customers grew to 396 from 317. 42 percent of Fortune 500 companies now use Datadog up from 37 percent. Platform Adoption: Cross-product adoption continued accelerating with 83 percent of customers using two or more products up from 81 percent and 47 percent using four or more products up from 42 percent. Products outside core observability grew ARR by more than 75 percent year-over-year. Outlook: For fiscal 2024, Datadog expects Revenue growth of 20-21 percent to 2.555-2.575 billion, Operating margins of 21-22 percent, EPS guidance of 1.38-1.44. CEO Olivier Pomel noted that the worst of cloud optimization may be behind us.
